title: delphinium pylzowii var. trigynum
intro: Delphinium pylzowii var. trigynum is a variety of the Delphinium pylzowii plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is a perennial plant native to Russia and China, known for its tall spikes of blue or white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The leaves and flowers of Delphinium pylzowii var. trigynum can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are believed to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health.
